summary: Troubleshoot BSSB trace problems with no data being recorded
evidence: Reworking MIPI60 pins, Connecting system traces using DCI, Streaming decode use cases (Broxton General Decode (BSSB)), Starting the trace twice, Using T32 and typing 'ca' to empty the buffer

summary: Comment out [Sinks.Console] section in logging.ini for collateral loading issues
evidence: Commenting out the [Sinks.Console] section in logging.ini resolves issues with collateral loading when NPK_ALL_DEBUG=1
